exam_name: NCLEX-PN (National Council Licensure Examination for Practical/Vocational Nurses)
exam_format: Computer Adaptive Testing (CAT) — Next Generation NCLEX (NGN)
exam_price_notes: NCLEX examination fee $200. State LPN/LVN licensure application fees vary.

testing_centers.notes: Computer-based testing at Pearson VUE NCLEX testing centers

id_requirements: Primary ID: government-issued photo ID with signature (e.g., driver's license or passport). Name must match Authorization to Test (ATT) exactly. Fingerprinting required at test center.
exam_rules: Closed-book. On-screen calculator provided for some questions. No personal items in testing room. Wet-erase board provided (not paper). Next Generation NCLEX (NGN) includes new item types: extended multiple response, extended drag and drop, cloze (drop-down), enhanced hot spot, matrix/grid, and trend items. Exam uses Computerized Adaptive Testing (CAT) — difficulty adjusts based on your answers.
renewal_options: NCLEX is taken once for initial licensure. Nursing license renewal is managed by individual state boards (typically every 2 years with continuing education requirements).

prerequisites.description: Must have completed an approved practical/vocational nursing education program and received ATT (Authorization to Test)

retake_policy.notes: Must wait 45 days before retaking NCLEX. Most state boards allow unlimited attempts but may impose additional restrictions. Full exam fee required for each retake.

domains.name: Safe and Effective Care Environment (Coordination of Care, Safety/Infection Control)
Physiological Integrity (Basic Care, Pharmacological, Reduction of Risk, Physiological Adaptation)

official_study_resources.title: NCLEX-RN Examination Test Plan
official_study_resources.notes: Free downloadable test plan detailing content areas and clinical judgment model

official_study_resources.title: NCLEX Practice Exam (via Pearson VUE / NCSBN Learning Extension)
official_study_resources.notes: Official NCSBN practice exams available through NCSBN Learning Extension

aliases: nclex-pn national council licensure examination for practical vocational nurses
